name: NTDS.dit Access - Active Directory Database Credential Extraction
description: Detects NTDS.dit access for full AD credential extraction via ntdsutil, Volume Shadow Copy, or direct file copy. Covers ntdsutil IFM, vssadmin shadow copy, and esentutl approaches.
query: process where event.type == "start" and ((process.name == "ntdsutil.exe" and process.args : ("ifm", "*create*full*", "*ac*i*ntds*")) or (process.args : "*ntds.dit*") or (process.name == "esentutl.exe" and process.args : "*ntds*"))
